text: Filter element 1 set b) Actuators alongwith motors 1 sets c) Debris discharge and other valves 1 sets d) Gaskets etc. 2 sets e) Nut and bolts etc. 1 set 9.3.5 HP and LP Chemical Dosing Systems A) Phosphate dosing system i) Dosing pumps and drives 1 No. of each type and size ii) Agitators 1 No. of each type and size iii) Reduction gear assembly 1 No. of each type and size iv) Strainers 1 No. of each type and size v) Valves 1 No. of each type and size B) Hydrazine dosing system i) Dosing pumps and drives 1 No. of each type and size ii) Agitators 1 No. of each type and size iii) Reduction gear assembly 1 No. of each type and size iv) Strainers 1 No. of each type and size v) Valves 1 No. of each type and size C) Ammonia dosing system i) Dosing pumps and drives 1 No. of each type and size Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project -
